creator: bhughes@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 167912
patch from a git commit, apply with patch -p1

Upgrade devel/awscli and devel/py-botocore to the latest versions. Both
packages need to be updated at the same time, as they are developed and
released in tandem.

Patch attached. See also https://github.com/bradleythughes/freebsd-ports/commit/53970e23342ac3b85d0f277301373a5dd227e1bd
